title: SpaceX confirms SEC confidential IPO filing, targeting mid-2026 listing
summary: SpaceX has submitted a confidential IPO filing to the SEC on April 1. Sources familiar with the matter indicate the company is targeting a valuation north of $350 billion.

title: Bitget and Binance launch SpaceX pre-IPO token products on April 10
summary: Crypto exchanges Bitget and Binance simultaneously launched SpaceX pre-IPO derivative tokens, with combined 24h trading volume exceeding $180M.

title: DXYZ premium narrows to 24% as IPO timeline crystallizes
summary: Destiny Tech100 Fund's premium over NAV compressed from 40% to 24% in April as the SpaceX IPO filing became public knowledge, signaling market repricing.

title: Goldman Sachs raises SpaceX valuation estimate to $380B ahead of S-1
summary: Goldman Sachs equity research revised its SpaceX valuation model upward citing Starlink ARPU growth and accelerating commercial launch revenues.

title: Starship Flight 9 declared full success, launch cadence target set at 24/year
summary: SpaceX's ninth Starship integrated flight test completed all primary mission objectives. Elon Musk confirmed a target of 24 launches per year by 2027.
